code: import React from'react';import{useAdmin}from'../context/AdminContext';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function Navbar(){const{isAuthenticated,logout,activeTab,setActiveTab,openAuthModal}=useAdmin();const tabs=[{key:'dashboard',label:'📊 Dashboard'},{key:'orders',label:'📋 Orders'},{key:'inventory',label:'📦 Inventory'}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("nav",{className:"admin-nav",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"nav-logo",children:["Pizzeria ",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"Inferno"})," \uD83D\uDD25",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"admin-badge",children:"Admin"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"nav-tabs",children:tabs.map(t=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:`nav-tab ${activeTab===t.key?'active':''}`,onClick:()=>setActiveTab(t.key),children:t.label},t.key))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"nav-right",children:isAuthenticated?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"auth-btn logout-btn",onClick:logout,children:"Logout"}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"auth-btn signin-btn",onClick:openAuthModal,children:"Admin Login"})})]});}
